stemHtml: An aircraft is flying a long-haul North Atlantic flight. What is true about the pilots?

options.a: There is no stress nor arousal, but vigilance must be maintained.
options.b: Stress and arousal are likely low, but vigilance must be maintained.
options.c: There is no stress but vigilance and arousal must be maintained high.
options.d: Vigilance is low but stress and arousal are appropriate.
